name: session_manager
description: Manages work sessions with unique IDs. Creates exactly one canonical task directory per task under workspace/<task_id>/, tracks file changes and agent/tool usage, appends notes, and closes sessions with a final summary. Sessions are indexed in workspace/session_index.json.

session_id.description: Session ID / task ID (format: YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS or YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_NN). Required for all actions except 'create', 'list', and 'active'.

description.description: Human-readable description. Used when creating a session or closing one as a close summary.

data.description: Payload for the action. log_change expects {file, action, summary, diff_preview}; log_agent expects {agent_id}; log_tool expects {tool_name}; add_note expects {note}; close expects {summary}; create optionally accepts {description, tags}.

status_filter.description: For 'list' action: filter sessions by status (e.g., 'active', 'closed'). Returns all sessions if omitted.
